_source_notes: Seat configs based on typical two/three-class configurations used by real operators (e.g., Qantas A320/A321/787-9 family). Range and cruise fuel burn are publicly published manufacturer figures (Airbus/Boeing spec sheets). CASK (cost per available-seat-km, USD) is an approximate industry-typical figure derived from published airline cost reports (IATA/CAPA economic analyses) - treat as a calibration starting point, not an exact figure for any single carrier.
